summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin & Agent Management Portal. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), but critical frontend-backend integration issues found preventing data loading.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button exists but may not be functioning properly
Password field not accessible during agent login testing

integration_issues.issue: Frontend not fetching data from backend APIs - all pages show empty state despite backend having seeded data
Shows 0 for all metrics (agents, events, students) instead of actual counts from backend
Could not fully test session persistence due to logout issues

passed_tests: All backend API endpoints returning data
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend-backend integration. Backend APIs work perfectly but frontend is not fetching data. Check DataContext initialization, API call implementation, and CORS configuration. All pages show empty state despite backend having 3 agents, 3 events, and 3 students.

success_percentage.frontend: 60% - UI works but data loading broken
